rows.note: Earn a 7-7-7 on a slot machine at a Game Corner. · 5 pts

rows.note: Win a x24 bet in the Card Flip minigame at a Game Corner. · 3 pts

rows.note: Win the Bug-Catching Contest at the National Park. · 5 pts

rows.note: Win the Bug-Catching Contest without catching a Butterfree, a Beedrill, a Scyther, or a Pinsir. · 10 pts

rows.label: Earning Style Points
rows.note: Win the Bug-Catching Contest with Cooltrainer Nick as a participant. · 10 pts

rows.note: Nurse Moomoo back to health at Moomoo Farm. · 2 pts

rows.note: Have a Shuckle turn a Berry into Berry Juice after a battle. · 1 pts

rows.label: Alphabet Scoop
rows.note: Catch all 26 forms of Unown. · 10 pts

rows.label: Scaling for Scaling
rows.note: Trade the Red Scale to Mr. Pokémon on Route 30 for the EXP Share. · 2 pts

rows.note: Defeat every possible Trainer aboard the S.S. Aqua excluding those from the first voyage. · 5 pts

rows.label: Pokémania Runs in the Family
rows.note: Show all 5 requested Pokémon to Bill's grandfather on Route 25. · 5 pts

rows.label: This One's For You, Doll
rows.note: Receive a Pass for the Magnet Train from the Copycat in Saffron City. · 2 pts

rows.label: The Reel Pokédex

rows.label: The Thief's Last Stand
rows.note: Win the optional battle against your rival at Indigo Plateau. · 5 pts

rows.label: For That Nice & Shiny Coat
rows.note: Have Daisy Oak comb your Pokémon in Pallet Town. · 2 pts

rows.label: Cute, Soft, & Made with Love
rows.note: Own every Poké Doll purchased by Mom. · 5 pts

rows.label: The Anger of a Gentle 'Mon
rows.note: Have your Pokémon in the first slot use Frustration or Return at its maximum power. · 5 pts

rows.label: Didn't Know You Had It in You!
rows.note: Deal super effective damage with Hidden Power. · 2 pts

rows.label: Element of Generosity
rows.note: Receive an Evolution stone from a registered Pokégear Trainer. · 2 pts

rows.label: Deals on Wheels
rows.note: Promote the Miracle Cycle bike shop in Goldenrod City and be allowed to keep the bike. · 2 pts

rows.label: Our Store's Up High, But Our Prices Are Low
rows.note: Make a purchase in the Rooftop Sale on the roof of the Goldenrod Department Store. · 2 pts

rows.note: Add Buena's phone number to your Pokégear after earning 30 Blue Card points. · 10 pts

rows.label: Fun to Sell Off, Not to Eat
rows.note: Receive a Nugget from either Pokéfan Beverly or Pokéfan Derek. · 2 pts

rows.label: Practicing 1 Move 10,000 Times
rows.note: Receive a PP Up from Blackbelt Kenji. · 5 pts

rows.label: Strength from Numbers

rows.label: More Valuable than Any Dollar
rows.note: Receive every in-game Gift Pokémon. · 5 pts

rows.label: Link Cable Not Included
rows.note: Complete every in-game trade. · 5 pts

rows.note: Defeat every non-missable Trainer in Johto. · 25 pts

rows.note: Collect every visible and hidden field item in Johto. · 25 pts

rows.note: Defeat every non-missable Trainer in Kanto. · 10 pts

rows.note: Collect every visible and hidden field item in Kanto. · 10 pts
